title: asterostigma lividum var. typicum
intro: Asterostigma lividum var. typicum, also known as the 'Black Snakeroot', is a plant species that belongs to the family Arum. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of the toxic compound, calcium oxalate crystals, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Asterostigma lividum var. typicum include its ability to aid in the reduction of fever, alleviate pain, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its health benefits, but caution is advised due to its toxic nature and potential side effects.
